description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a smooth, flat surface and four straight legs positioned at each corner. The tabletop is adorned with three identical decorative objects, each resembling a small, ornate finial or sculpted ornament, evenly spaced along the centerline. The table's finish is a warm, medium-brown wood tone, giving it a classic and sturdy appearance suitable for communal or public use. The legs are simple and unembellished, providing stable support for the tabletop. The decorative objects add a touch of elegance and visual interest, making the table suitable for both functional and aesthetic purposes in urban environments. The overall design is minimalistic yet refined, with a focus on utility and subtle ornamentation.
description: A rectangular wooden table with four legs and three decorative finials arranged along its center. The table has a smooth, medium-brown finish and a simple, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the table's narrow side with one decorative finial visible at the center.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the table and all three decorative finials evenly spaced along the top.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, with one central decorative finial visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the table's length and all three decorative finials.
